reference_answer: Field Note FN-4 confirmed that plot C received the low-water treatment.
The exact amount of shade on June 8 is unclear because the light meter file was damaged.
The first germination count was corrected from 18 to 16.
The seed-source claim in the morning email was rescinded.
The compost comparison remains unresolved until the second soil test returns.
The yield ranking is provisional because the north bed had not been harvested.
The pest-damage claim is unsupported because the leaf photos show wind tear instead.
Schedule WS-3 replaced the earlier watering schedule.
The coordinator inferred that low water did not reduce germination in plot C.
The note does not mention the brand of the shade cloth.
